name: Ubiquiti SuperLink
title: Ubiquiti SuperLink
short_description: The Ubiquiti SuperLink (UP-SuperLink) is a powerful wireless gateway that extends the functionality of UniFi Protect sensors. It offers reliable long-range connectivity, supporting seamless communication in large-scale environments. With Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) for short-range and Ubiquiti’s proprietary SuperLink protocol for long-range communication, the SuperLink ensures a reliable data transmission even in demanding conditions.
description: The Ubiquiti SuperLink (UP-SuperLink) is a powerful wireless gateway that extends the functionality of UniFi Protect sensors. It offers reliable long-range connectivity, supporting seamless communication in large-scale environments. With Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) for short-range and Ubiquiti’s proprietary SuperLink protocol for long-range communication, the SuperLink ensures a reliable data transmission even in demanding conditions. It can cover distances of up to 2 kilometers, making it suitable for larger properties like commercial buildings and industrial sites. Its versatility allows it to be effectively utilized in both professional and residential security settings, supporting various monitoring and automation functions.

detailed_description.heading: High-Performance Wireless Gateway
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti SuperLink (UP-SuperLink) is a powerful wireless gateway that extends the functionality of UniFi Protect sensors. It offers reliable long-range connectivity, supporting seamless communication in large-scale environments. With Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) for short-range and Ubiquiti’s proprietary SuperLink protocol for long-range communication, the SuperLink ensures a reliable data transmission even in demanding conditions. It can cover distances of up to 2 kilometers, making it suitable for larger properties like commercial buildings and industrial sites. Its versatility allows it to be effectively utilized in both professional and residential security settings, supporting various monitoring and automation functions.

detailed_description.heading: Efficient Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The SuperLink consumes just 5W of power, delivering exceptional energy efficiency without compromising performance. Designed for seamless deployment, it supports Power over Ethernet (PoE), eliminating the need for separate power cables and simplifying installation. For added versatility, it also includes a USB-C power input, allowing flexible placement in various environments. The ability to run on PoE enhances its ease of integration into existing network infrastructures, making it an ideal solution for both new installations and retrofit projects. Additionally, the SuperLink ensures end-to-end encryption for all data transmitted between sensors and the gateway, providing a secure, reliable foundation for advanced surveillance and monitoring systems.

detailed_description.heading: Secure and Scalable Deployment
detailed_description.text: The SuperLink comes with multiple mounting options, including wall mounts and DIN rail mounts, ensuring a straightforward installation process in various environments. Whether used in offices, warehouses, or outdoor locations, the device can be securely mounted for optimal performance. The included mounting accessories ensure ease of setup, while the robust construction guarantees the device can withstand various conditions. The device supports up to 96 SuperLink sensors and 7 legacy UP-Sense devices, making it scalable for a variety of setups. This flexibility ensures reliable coverage, even in expansive and complex environments. The SuperLink offers versatility and flexibility in both installation and deployment, making it an excellent choice for a wide range of applications.
